prompt: Apply stylized cel-shading along architectural edges.
prompt_refined: Use image 1 (the realistic castle rendering) as the source image. Apply stylized cel-shading to the entire castle structure. The style of the cel-shading, particularly the sharp outlines along all architectural edges, should be guided by the crispness and graphic nature presented in image 2 (the edge map).
objects: sharp outlines along castle architectural edges
